# Nimbus Design System — Token Reference

> Always read this file first. For component specs see [design-components.md](design-components.md). For accessibility and do's/don'ts see [design-guidelines.md](design-guidelines.md). For a live preview see [design-preview.html](design-preview.html).

Nimbus is a web-based project management tool built with React + Tailwind. The visual language is clean and utilitarian with a single strong accent color, Inter as the primary typeface, an 8px base spacing unit, and full light/dark theming since a large share of usage happens late at night.

## Colors

### Accent — Primary

| Role | Light Hex | Dark Hex | Usage |
|------|-----------|----------|-------|
| primary | `#2D6CDF` | `#A9C6FF` | High-emphasis fills, primary buttons, links, active nav item |
| on-primary | `#FFFFFF` | `#0B2A6B` | Text/icons on primary |
| primary-container | `#DCE7FB` | `#1E3A6E` | Selected states, subtle emphasis backgrounds |
| on-primary-container | `#0B2A6B` | `#DCE7FB` | Text/icons on primary-container |

### Surface & Neutral

| Role | Light Hex | Dark Hex | Usage |
|------|-----------|----------|-------|
| surface | `#FFFFFF` | `#111318` | Page background |
| surface-variant | `#F3F4F6` | `#1B1E24` | Cards, table row stripes |
| on-surface | `#1A1C1E` | `#E3E2E6` | Primary text |
| on-surface-variant | `#5C6066` | `#A9ACB4` | Secondary text, placeholders |
| outline | `#DADCE0` | `#3A3D42` | Borders, dividers |

### Semantic / Status

| Role | Light Hex | Dark Hex | Usage |
|------|-----------|----------|-------|
| success | `#1E8E3E` | `#7FDB9A` | Completed task states |
| warning | `#B8860B` | `#F2C744` | Due-soon indicators |
| error | `#D93025` | `#F2938C` | Overdue, destructive actions |
| on-error | `#FFFFFF` | `#5C0A05` | Text/icons on error |

## Dark Mode / Theming

Nimbus toggles theme via a `data-theme="light" | "dark"` attribute on `<html>`, driven by a user preference stored in local storage (defaulting to `prefers-color-scheme`). All surface, text, and status tokens above swap between the Light Hex and Dark Hex columns; component code should always reference the CSS custom property, never the raw hex.

| Token | Light | Dark |
|-------|-------|------|
| surface | `#ffffff` | `#111318` |
| on-surface | `#1a1c1e` | `#e3e2e6` |
| outline | `#dadce0` | `#3a3d42` |

## Typography

Font family: `Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif`.

| Style | Size | Weight | Line Height | Spacing |
|-------|------|--------|-------------|---------|
| Display | 36px | 700 | 44px | -0.25px |
| Headline | 28px | 700 | 36px | 0 |
| Title | 20px | 600 | 28px | 0 |
| Body Large | 16px | 400 | 24px | 0 |
| Body Medium | 14px | 400 | 20px | 0 |
| Label | 12px | 600 | 16px | 0.2px |

## Spacing

Base unit: 4px — all spacing is a multiple of 4.

| Token | Value | Usage |
|-------|-------|-------|
| space-1 | 4px | Icon-to-label gap |
| space-2 | 8px | Compact component padding |
| space-4 | 16px | Card padding, form field gap |
| space-6 | 24px | Section gap within a page |
| space-8 | 32px | Page-level section separation |

## Shape

| Token | Radius | Components |
|-------|--------|------------|
| sm | 6px | Chips, badges, tooltips |
| md | 10px | Cards, modals, inputs |
| full | 999px | Pills, avatar, toggle track |

## Elevation

| Level | CSS Shadow | Usage |
|-------|-----------|-------|
| 0 | none | Base page background |
| 1 | `0 1px 2px rgb(0 0 0 / .08), 0 1px 3px rgb(0 0 0 / .1)` | Cards at rest |
| 2 | `0 4px 8px rgb(0 0 0 / .12), 0 2px 4px rgb(0 0 0 / .08)` | Dropdowns, popovers |
| 3 | `0 12px 24px rgb(0 0 0 / .16), 0 4px 8px rgb(0 0 0 / .08)` | Modals |

## Interaction States

| State | Layer Opacity | Notes |
|-------|-------------|-------|
| Enabled | 0% | Resting |
| Hover | 6% | Cursor over |
| Focus | 10% + 2px visible outline | Keyboard focus |
| Pressed | 10% | Mouse/touch down |
| Disabled | 38% content, 12% container | Inoperable |

## Layout

| Class | Width | Panes | Navigation |
|-------|-------|-------|------------|
| Compact | < 720px | 1 | Collapsible top bar |
| Medium | 720–1199px | 1–2 | Persistent side nav rail |
| Expanded | ≥ 1200px | 2 | Full side nav + detail pane |

## Motion

Easing: `cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1)` for standard transitions, `cubic-bezier(0.3, 0, 0.8, 0.15)` for exits.
Durations: short `120ms` (hover/press feedback), medium `200ms` (dropdowns, tooltips), long `320ms` (modals, page transitions).

## Icons

24×24px grid, 2px stroke weight, rounded line-caps (Lucide icon set).

## Design Tokens

Naming convention: kebab-case, `category.token-name`, matching the Tailwind config already used in the codebase.

| Token Name | Value | Semantic Meaning |
|------------|-------|-----------------|
| `color.primary` | `#2d6cdf` | Primary brand accent |
| `color.surface` | `#ffffff` | Page background |
| `color.on-surface` | `#1a1c1e` | Primary text color |
| `space.4` | `16px` | Standard component padding |
| `radius.md` | `10px` | Card/modal/input corner radius |
| `elevation.2` | `0 4px 8px rgb(0 0 0 / .12), 0 2px 4px rgb(0 0 0 / .08)` | Dropdown/popover shadow |
